days.notes: Embarkation day! Haven priority boarding from 11am. Suite 12846. Dinner at Sukhothai at 6pm. Holly has a salon appointment at 3pm. Tonight: meet your butler, visit Haven concierge to book anniversary dinner and show seating, flag Holly's gluten-free requirement fleet-wide. Muster station E5 — The Local Bar, Deck 8. Holly's Thermal Suite 7-Day Pass activates at 8pm.

ANNIVERSARY DAY — 20 years! Bingo at 11am in Luna Theater. Fred: NAD+ treatment at 1:30pm (Mandara Spa). Holly: acupuncture consultation at 1:30pm in Mandara Spa, then facial at 2pm (arrive 15 min early). Bingo at 4pm at the Improv at Sea. Thermal Suite open all day. Dinner at Cagney's Steakhouse at 6pm. Show tonight: HIKO — meet at Deck 6 Luna Theater entrance, left side, before 7:30pm (Haven priority seating). Formal/smart-casual night.
reservations: Holly spa: Targeted Technology Facial — 2:00pm (✅ confirmed)
🎭 HIKO show — Deck 6 Luna Theater, left side, before 7:30pm (Haven priority)

days.notes: Harvest Caye, Belize — NCL private island. Late arrival 10:30am. Excursion: Howler Monkey River Expedition at 11am (boat cruise, howler monkeys, crocodiles, herons). All aboard 5:30pm. Dinner at Hasuki at 6:30pm.

Roatán, Honduras. Arrive 8am. Excursion: Monkeys, Sloths & Macaws at noon. Pre-excursion: explore port area. Post-excursion: Haven pool. All aboard 5pm. Dinner at Onda by Scarpetta at 6:30pm. Don't wear loose jewelry — the monkeys are curious.

Costa Maya, Mexico. Arrive 8am, all aboard 4:30pm. No excursion booked — options: Chacchoben Mayan Ruins (~40 min taxi), Mahahual beach town, or stay onboard (Haven pool is quiet on port days). Dinner at Le Bistro at 6pm. Second formal/smart-casual night.

Cozumel, Mexico. Arrive 7am. Excursion: VIP Dolphin Swim at Dolphinaris at 9:30am — no phones in water, buy photos after. Post-excursion: downtown San Miguel shopping (silver, vanilla, Kahlúa). All aboard 4:30pm. Dinner at Los Lobos at 6:30pm.

Last sea day. Holly: Keratin Hair Treatment at Mandara Spa at 11am. Haven pool and deck, Holly's Thermal Suite last day, casino final session, Syd Norman's Pour House in the evening. Dinner at Palomar at 6pm. Pack tonight — set luggage outside suite before bed. Tip the butler and concierge tonight.
reservations: 💆 Holly: Keratin Hair Treatment — Mandara Spa, 11:00am

days.notes: Disembarkation day. Arrive Miami ~7am. Haven guests disembark first — concierge arranges priority. Collect checked luggage in terminal.
